summary: Completed testing of REG (General Round) updates including SharePoint integration, category dropdown, and auto-numbering functionality. Backend APIs working correctly, but critical frontend JavaScript issues prevent category selection from functioning.

critical_bugs.issue: Category dropdown selection not triggering API calls - handleSelectCategory function not executing
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot select categories, preventing auto-numbering and title image functionality
critical_bugs.details: Dropdown opens and shows 20 categories correctly, but clicking on any category doesn't trigger the expected API calls for reg-next-number or reg-download-title-image

critical_bugs.issue: Round name remains 'Select a category above' after category selection
critical_bugs.impact: Round name not auto-populated as 'Category N', preventing round creation

critical_bugs.issue: Title image preview not appearing after category selection
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot preview the SharePoint title image that will be used in PPTX

integration_issues.flow: REG Category Selection to API Integration
integration_issues.issue: Frontend click events not triggering backend API calls
integration_issues.root_cause: JavaScript event handler handleSelectCategory not executing properly

ui_bugs.issue: Form requires category selection but validation message unclear when category selection fails

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/reg-next-number/{category} returns correct next number
Backend API: POST /api/reg-download-title-image downloads images successfully
Backend API: GET /api/uploads/{filename} serves downloaded images
REG form displays category dropdown instead of text input
Category dropdown opens and shows 20 category options
Other round types (MC, MISC, MYS, BIG) unaffected - still show text input
REG PPTX generation works with downloaded SharePoint images
REG auto-numbering logic works correctly in backend
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix REG category selection JavaScript functionality. The handleSelectCategory function in RoundCreator.js is not executing when users click category options. This prevents the core REG functionality (auto-numbering and SharePoint title images) from working. All backend APIs are working correctly - this is purely a frontend JavaScript/React event handling issue.

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All new REG endpoints working correctly
success_percentage.frontend: 30% - UI layout correct but core functionality broken due to JavaScript issues
